/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libNotificationsPlugin.so -o libNotificationsPlugin.so CMakeFiles/NotificationsPlugin.dir/NotificationsPlugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.o CMakeFiles/NotificationsPlugin.dir/NotificationHelper.o CMakeFiles/NotificationsPlugin.dir/plugin.o  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Quick.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5DBus.so.5.15.13 -lglib-2.0 -lnotify -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5QmlModels.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Qml.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13 -lnotify -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0
